name: 音乐盒 | Humanity's Last Breath - 虚空
nameEn: Music Kit | Humanity's Last Breath, Void
nameZh: 音乐盒 | Humanity's Last Breath - 虚空
descriptionEn: This Music Kit will replace all of the music in the game and is shareable with anyone you are playing with. It also includes an MVP Anthem that plays for everyone in the match when you are MVP. The Music Kit replaces the following music: - Main Menu - Round Start and End - Map Objective - Ten Second
descriptionZh: 这个音乐盒将替换游戏中的所有音乐，并且能和与您一起游戏的所有玩家分享。当您成为 MVP 时，音乐盒将向比赛中的所有玩家高奏 MVP 凯歌。 音乐盒将替换以下音乐： - 主菜单 - 回合开始和结束 - 地图目标 - 十秒警告 - 死亡视角这款“虚空”音乐盒由瑞典乐队Humanity's Last Breath打造，伴随着猛烈的鼓点，通过大量的重金属乐段，呈现一种不寒而栗的气氛。
